input.text:
Shift 1 Handoff:

Bed 1 – Mrs. Patricia Reyes (P1):
• 84, post-fall hip ORIF, day 4. Allergies: penicillin. Full code.
• Vitals: HR 78, RR 16, SpO2 97%, BP 132, Temp 36.8°C. NEWS2: 0.
• Stable, no acute concerns. Enoxaparin given. Continue standard post-op checks and assess pain.

Bed 2 – Mrs. Elena Aquino (P2) [FOCAL]:
• 78, post-CAP day 6. Allergies: sulfa. DNR, POLST on file. CHF, T2DM on furosemide and metformin. Last dose of azithromycin given this AM.
• Vitals: HR 89, RR 17, SpO2 95%, BP 124, Temp 37.1°C. NEWS2: 1.
• Notable change: Pale and more withdrawn today vs. yesterday. Picking at breakfast, less interactive, but no overt distress. Behavioral shift may be prodromal; please observe closely for any further changes.

Bed 3 – Mr. Walter Goldberg (P3):
• 91, dementia, recurrent UTI on ceftriaxone. DNR/DNI/DNH, no allergies.
• Vitals: HR 92, RR 20, SpO2 94%, BP 110, Temp 37.6°C. NEWS2: 5.
• No current distress, antibiotics administered, continue standard care.

Significant Events/Recommendations:
- Mrs. Aquino in Bed 2: Subtle behavioral change. Please prioritize repeat observations and reassessment.
- No allergies or code changes noted otherwise. All scheduled meds given. No immediate issues in P1 or P3.
- Recommend early rounds for P2 and extra attention to subtle symptoms or new complaints.
